title: xanthoxalis polyantha
intro: Xanthoxalis polyantha, also known as the yellow wood sorrel, is a perennial plant native to Europe, Asia, and North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xanthoxalis polyantha include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Xanthoxalis polyantha can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to treat various ailments, from skin conditions to respiratory issues.
